info.name: OFROO — New & Updated Endpoints (MOBILE_NEW_ENDPOINTS.md)
info.description: Postman collection covering every endpoint introduced or updated in MOBILE_NEW_ENDPOINTS.md. Base URL is stored in the {{base_url}} collection variable (e.g. https://your-host). Authenticated requests require {{token}} to be set (Sanctum Bearer token).

variable.description: Short-lived Bearer (≈1h). Use on protected routes.
Long-lived refresh (≈30d). Use only with POST …/auth/refresh — never as Bearer on normal API.

item.name: 0. Auth — Refresh tokens (Sanctum)
item.description:
Public POST. Send your **refresh_token** from login/register — not the access token.

**Body option:** `{ "refresh_token": "…" }`
**Header option:** `Authorization: Bearer <refresh_token>`

Response: `token` (new access), `refresh_token` (new — old one is revoked), `expires_in` (seconds), `refresh_expires_at`, `user`.

Throttle: 30/min per route.

request.description: Mobile prefix. After success, collection vars `token` + `refresh_token` are updated if the Test script runs.
Same as …/auth/refresh.
Non-mobile path. No JSON body — refresh token only in Authorization header.
Same handler as /api/auth/refresh.

Creates an order from specific coupon IDs, generates QR codes and deep links. On success the user's entire cart is cleared automatically (same behaviour as cart checkout).

Constraints:
- user_id must match the authenticated user (403)
- All coupons must belong to the same merchant (422)
- No coupon may be expired (422)
- card payments blocked when electronic-payments feature flag is off (403)

response.name: 403 — user_id mismatch or payments disabled
response.body: { "message": "user_id does not match the authenticated user" }

response.name: 422 — validation / expired coupon / multi-merchant
response.body: { "message": "All coupons must belong to the same merchant" }

request.description: Alias of POST /api/mobile/checkout/coupons — identical behaviour.

query.description: valid | expired | inactive | activated — omit for all orders

request.description:
List authenticated user's orders. The optional coupon_status query parameter filters by the state of coupon entitlements inside each order.

| Value     | Arabic         | Filter logic |
|-----------|----------------|--------------|
| valid     | صالح           | status=active AND times_used=0 AND remaining>0 |
| expired   | منتهي          | status IN (expired, exhausted) |
| inactive  | غير مفعل      | status=pending |
| activated | تم تفعيله     | status=active AND times_used>0 |
Public endpoint. Returns offer details + shareable URLs for WhatsApp, Facebook, Snapchat, TikTok.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Public endpoint. Returns store links and per-platform share URLs (WhatsApp, Facebook, Snapchat, TikTok). Data is read from admin-managed settings keys: play_store_url, app_store_url, app_landing_url, app_share_message_ar, app_share_message_en.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Public endpoint. Returns support email, WhatsApp number and ready-made wa.me link. Values are never null — empty string is returned when not configured.
Public endpoint. Returns CMS-managed about sections plus social media links. Falls back to legacy app_description_* settings when the app_sections table is empty.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Public endpoint. Returns privacy policy sections from the app_policies table (type=privacy). Falls back to legacy static_privacy_ar / static_privacy_en settings when the table is empty.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: One-tap delete: password is now optional. The Sanctum bearer token is sufficient proof of ownership. Anonymises PII, deletes avatar, revokes all tokens, and soft-deletes the User row.

response.name: 422 — wrong password supplied
response.body: { "message": "The given data was invalid.", "errors": { "password": ["The password is incorrect."] } }

request.description: Backward-compatible: supply password for extra verification. If provided, it is validated before deletion.

query.description: Search term (Arabic/English). Also accepts 'search' as alias.

request.description: Unified, paginated search across offers + coupons + categories. Each result item includes a 'type' discriminator. The non-mobile /api/search endpoint is unchanged.

request.description: Public endpoint to register a new merchant account. 'accepted_terms' is required and must be true.

response.name: 201 Created
response.body:

response.name: 422 Unprocessable Entity — terms not accepted

request.description: Paginated list. Admin sees ALL rows including inactive. Alias: /api/admin/app-policies
Fetch a single section by ID.

body.raw:
{
    "type": "about",
    "title_ar": "من نحن",
    "title_en": "About Us",
    "description_ar": "OFROO تطبيق عروض...",
    "description_en": "OFROO is a deals app...",
    "order_index": 0,
    "is_active": true
}

request.description: Create a new section. 'type' is required (privacy | about | support). Aliases: policy→privacy, about_app→about, help→support.
Update an existing section. 'type' is optional in update.
Delete a section by ID.
Bulk reorder sections. Provide an array of { id, order_index } pairs.
Returns the existing settings map PLUS two new sibling keys: 'static_sections' (privacy/about/support rows) and 'endpoints' (CRUD URLs for the mobile CMS). All existing keys are unchanged.

item.name: PUT Admin Settings (flat form — new mobile keys)

{

request.description: Flat key-value form. New mobile-CMS keys are now accepted by the validator. All pre-existing keys continue to work unchanged.
Array form (already supported). Each item is { key, value }.

query.description: valid | expired | inactive | activated (optional — omit for all orders)

request.description: Admin order list gains the same coupon_status filter as the mobile endpoint. Response shape is unchanged when the param is omitted.
